{
  "claims": [
    "California faces a homeless crisis due to a housing affordability issue.",
    "Stronger tenant protections can help prevent housing displacement and homelessness.",
    "AB 485 aims to cap rental application fees at $40.",
    "AB 485 seeks to eliminate the provision allowing landlords to raise application fees based on the Consumer Price Index (CPI).",
    "AB 500 mandates that tenants receive future rent increase notifications 90 days in advance, regardless of the increase amount.",
    "Current law requires landlords to give either 30 or 90 days’ notice for rent increases depending on the percentage of the increase."
  ]
}
